name: onehome-mcp
description: OneHome (CoreLogic) real-estate access for Claude — search listings, fetch property details, photos, schools, and run mortgage / affordability math against your agent-shared OneHome portal

tools.name: onehome_get_user
tools.description: Fetch the signed-in OneHome user profile + shared groups

tools.name: onehome_get_groups
tools.description: List the OneHome consumer-share groups your agent has shared with you

tools.name: onehome_get_session_context
tools.description: Inspect the MCP's bootstrapped magic-link session context

tools.name: onehome_get_saved_search
tools.description: Fetch an agent-curated saved search by id

tools.name: onehome_search_properties
tools.description: List the properties in a OneHome consumer-share / saved search

tools.name: onehome_search_suggestions
tools.description: Free-text suggestion / address search across MLS feeds

tools.name: onehome_get_property
tools.description: Fetch a property's full details by OneHome listing id

tools.name: onehome_get_property_photos
tools.description: Full photo gallery for a OneHome listing

tools.name: onehome_get_schools
tools.description: Local-Logic primary + high schools near a lat/lng

tools.name: onehome_get_walk_score
tools.description: Local-Logic walk / transit / bike scores near a lat/lng

tools.name: onehome_graphql
tools.description: Power-user escape hatch: send a raw GraphQL document with variables

tools.name: onehome_calculate_mortgage
tools.description: Local PITI mortgage-payment calculator — no network
